prompt:
Subject: Rest Beyond the Hat

Main Figure: A 3:4 vertical realistic fashion portrait depicting a natural adult woman sitting on a wooden chair holding a iced coffee at a calm cafe on a street corner in Japan. The person occupies a large part of the screen from center to slightly right, capturing from head to thighs. Include the round edge of the table in the lower right, with window-side seating and a street view continuing into the far left.

Person/Expression: Long dark brown, almost black hair. Soft waves at the ends, with thin stray hairs beside the cheeks. Wearing a pale blue cap low, face tilted slightly downward to the right, eyes lowered toward the drink. Calm eyebrows, delicate eyelashes, light coral blush, natural eye bags, and a low-shine rose-beige lip. A quiet and peaceful expression.

Clothing/Pose: A white fine-ribbed short-sleeved cropped henley top. Short length ending slightly above the hip bone, with the top two buttons naturally open. Paired with pale blue high-waisted denim shorts and a small silver necklace. Her left arm is bent with the hand behind her head, elbow jutting to the left. The right hand wraps around the bottom of the transparent cup, fingers naturally aligned. Legs are lightly crossed on the chair, with weight leaning toward the right hip.

Background/Light: A small Japanese street-side cafe. To the right is a dark wood storage shelf and houseplants; in the center background is a blackboard with a handwritten Japanese menu. Large window on the far left, wooden counter, a customer sitting with their back turned, street trees, and blurred cars. Bright morning sunlight shines through the upper left window, softly illuminating the arm, cheek, white top, and left side of the thigh. Leaf shadows fall on the floor, with warm reflected light from the wood on the right.

Composition/Camera: 3:4 vertical, medium shot of sitting posture taken from a slightly elevated eye level. The person's face is in the top center, and the cup is near the lower-right third-line intersection. Leave appropriate margin above the cap, with the thighs naturally cut at the bottom edge. Natural perspective equivalent to 35-50mm, focus on the face and upper body, with the background gently blurred enough to recognize content.

Texture/Style: A natural cafe snapshot taken with a high-performance full-frame digital camera. Delicately depicts fine hair strands, cotton rib irregularities, denim fading, condensation on the cup, and wood grain. Skin is bright and smooth but retains moderate pores and shadows. Natural colors leaning toward warm tones, moderate contrast, and transparent highlights.

Negative: Unnatural faces, unnatural gazes, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, poor contact with cup, distorted chairs, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with light source, unreadable unnatural text, brand logos, watermarks, excessive skin retouching, plastic-like skin.

promptZh:
主题：帽檐下的休憩

主体：一张 3:4 竖构图的写实时尚人像，描绘了一位自然的成年女性，坐在木椅上，手持 冰咖啡，身处 日本街角的一家静谧咖啡馆。人物占据画面中心偏右的大部分区域，取景范围从头部到大腿。右下角包含桌子的圆边，左侧延伸出靠窗座位和街景。

人物/表情：长 深棕色，近乎黑色 发。发尾微卷，脸颊旁有细碎的发丝。戴着一顶低垂的浅蓝色鸭舌帽，脸部微微向右下方倾斜，双眼垂视着手中的饮品。眉形平和，睫毛纤长，轻抹珊瑚色腮红，自然的卧蚕，低光泽的玫瑰米色唇妆。表情宁静安详。

服装/姿势：身穿 白色细罗纹短袖短款亨利衫。衣长略高于髋骨，上方两颗纽扣自然解开。搭配浅蓝色高腰牛仔短裤和一条细银项链。左臂弯曲，手放在脑后，手肘向左突出。右手环绕在透明杯底，手指自然并拢。双腿在椅子上轻微交叠，重心偏向右侧臀部。

背景/光影：一家日式街边小咖啡馆。右侧是深色木质储物架和盆栽；背景中央是一块写有手写日文菜单的“项目”。最左侧是大窗户、木质柜台、一位背对镜头的顾客、行道树和模糊的车辆。明亮的晨光从左上方窗户射入，柔和地照亮了手臂、脸颊、白色上衣和大腿左侧。叶影投射在地面上，右侧木质家具反射出温暖的光线。

构图/摄影：3:4 竖构图，略微俯视的坐姿中景。人物面部位于顶部中心，杯子位于右下三分线交点附近。鸭舌帽上方留有适当的留白，大腿在底部边缘自然截断。相当于 35-50mm 的自然透视，焦点对准面部和上半身，背景虚化程度适中，足以辨认内容。

质感/风格：使用高性能全画幅数码相机拍摄的自然咖啡馆快照。细腻地刻画了发丝、棉质罗纹的纹理、牛仔布的褪色感、杯上的冷凝水珠以及木材纹理。皮肤明亮细腻，但保留了适度的毛孔和阴影。色彩自然，偏向暖色调，对比度适中，高光通透。

负面提示词：不自然的脸部、不自然的视线、多余的手指、缺失的手指、肢体融合、关节断裂、与杯子接触不良、椅子变形、透视错误、阴影与光源不一致、难以辨认的非自然文字、品牌 Logo、水印、过度磨皮、塑料感皮肤。
